implementationSummary: Added Alembic revision 018_analytics_interval_backfill_cols with four nullable DDL columns (live_hours Numeric(12,4), live_sessions, active_products, new_products) on analytics_performance_intervals; appended matching SQLAlchemy fields on AnalyticsPerformanceInterval; migration integration tests updated for head/downgrade paths; unit contract tests prove model + migration source; one-line shared-contract notes in ADR-029 and phase-2.9 PRD.

redGreenRefactorEvidence.behavior: analytics_performance_intervals exposes nullable backfill columns at head
redGreenRefactorEvidence.red: test_analytics_interval_backfill_columns_exist_at_head / model contract asserted four columns before migration 018 existed
redGreenRefactorEvidence.green: 018_analytics_interval_backfill_cols upgrade adds columns; AnalyticsPerformanceInterval fields appended; unit contract tests pass
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactor: Adjusted revision-017 downgrade integration test to target 016 explicitly now that 018 is head; kept DDL-only reversible op.add_column/op.drop_column pattern from 015

assumptions: analytics_performance_intervals remains shared schema per ADR-029; no parallel mart
GMV persisted as gmv/gmv_currency only; new columns are sparse nullable rollups
Integration migration tests require reachable Postgres DATABASE_URL (skip locally when absent)
